message:
test(conformance): add wide_string_ops and wide_memory fixture tests

Adds fixture tests for wide character operations:
- wide_string_ops: wcslen, wcscpy (strict/hardened)
- wide_memory: wmemcpy, wmemmove, wmemset, wmemcmp

Test count: 106 -> 108

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
